meta.title:
DCB consistency boundary:
AddItem reads StockLevel via
FetchForWritingByTags(sku);
SaveChanges asserts no other
Sku-tagged event slipped in.

Events with a Sku property are
tagged at append time via
new Event<T>(evt).AddTag(sku).

GetCart is a Marten Inline
Snapshot — folded from this
cart's stream only.
